name: testsigma-playwright-tests
description: Playwright tests converted from Testsigma - Correspondent Portal

scripts.test:Correspondant: npx playwright test tests/correspondant/REG_BidRequestsTestPlanIndependentTestcases && npx playwright test tests/correspondant/REG_BidRequestsTestPlanDoneTestCases && npx playwright test tests/correspondant/REG_Price_Offered_TestPlan && npx playwright test tests/correspondant/REG_Commitment_List_Testplan
scripts.test:Demo1Execution: npx playwright test tests/correspondant/DemoTP1 ; npx playwright test tests/correspondant/DemoTP2 ; npx playwright test tests/correspondant/DemoTP3 ; npx playwright test tests/correspondant/DemoTP4
